title: pft: An R package for reference values and interpretation of pulmonary function tests
description: An open-source R package for pulmonary function test (PFT) reference values and routine interpretation. Reference equations are drawn from the Global Lung Function Initiative family (GLI-2012 and GLI Global 2022 spirometry, GLI-2021 static lung volumes, and GLI-2017 diffusion capacity with the 2020 author correction). Interpretive primitives implement the current ERS/ATS technical standard (Stanojevic et al. 2022) for pattern classification, severity grading, bronchodilator response, PRISm identification, and conditional-change z-scores, together with GOLD airflow-limitation grading, Graham 2019 A-F spirometry acceptability grading, hemoglobin correction, and the FEV1Q survival index. Pellegrino et al. 2005 legacy primitives are retained for cross-standard reclassification analyses. The package is designed to incorporate future guideline revisions as they are published.
